---
name: Document correction
about: Small fixes — typos, broken links, formatting
title: "[FIX] "
labels: ["documentation", "blueprint"]
assignees: []
---

## Type of fix

- [ ] Typo
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Broken image / diagram
- [ ] Formatting (heading level, list, code block)
- [ ] Grammar / wording

## Location

- File path:
- Line number (if known):

## Current text

```
<quote the current text>
```

## Suggested text

```
<replacement>
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The fix does not change technical meaning
- [ ] For substantial changes, I will open a PR rather than expecting a maintainer to apply it
